verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Side by side we stand waiting God's command Worshipping the savior King Living by His grace And moving His power Jesus will save you as true

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'll meet you in heaven, We'll join hands together Meet you by the savior's side I'll meet you in heaven, We'll sing a song together Brothers and sisters, I'll be there.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Soldiers on the way To go where Jesus lead To fight the foe And you'll overcome Heaven is our goal To save every soul We'll pray that all will be there.
